title: filix fragilis var. dentata
intro: Filix fragilis var. dentata, also known as the brittle fern, is a variety of fern that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing blood pressure, improving respiratory health, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the brittle fern include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
